title: ipomoea kalimantanensis
intro: Ipomoea kalimantanensis, also known as the Kalimantan morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Ipomoea kalimantanensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antidiabetic properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions.
